Infrastructure Cost

Cost Optimization: Running AI Agents for $0/month

2026-03-01

We've engineered OpenSIN to run on 100% free infrastructure through OCI Always Free, Hugging Face Spaces, and Cloudflare Pages.

Infrastructure Breakdown

  • OCI A1.Flex — 4 OCPUs, 24GB RAM (Always Free)
  • Hugging Face Spaces — Individual agent workers (Free)
  • Cloudflare Pages — Static websites (Free)
  • Supabase — PostgreSQL database (Free tier: 500MB)

How we built the first open-source AI agent fleet with 100+ specialized agents working 24/7.

A2A Protocol: The Open Standard for Agent-to-Agent Communication

Deep dive into the Agent-to-Agent protocol that lets AI agents delegate work without human mediation.

How OpenSIN ensures no API keys, tokens, or secrets ever touch the codebase.
